titleStmt.title: SII 37.270: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 270. (A.R. No. B 376 of 1940-41.) Gollala-uppalapāḍu, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Broken slab lying in front of the Āñjaneya temple.
This is dated Śrāvaṇa śu. 12, Wednesday.

Damaged and incomplete. It registers a gift of land in Gollala Uppalapāḍu Nārāyaṇayya, son of Narasiṁha Bhaṭṭa of Pulivendala by Aḷiya Rāmappayyadēva Mahārāju of the Ātrēyagōtra, Apastaṁbasūtra and Yajus-śākhā, who held the Ghaṇḍikōṭasīma as nāyaṅkara under the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
subhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu saṁ
vatsara śrāvaṇa śu 12 bhudhavārāna śrīmadrājādhi
rājarājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī vīra sadāśi
varāyadēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratna si
hāsanārūḍhulai . pṛthvisāṁbrājyaṁ cēyu
[Ātrē]yagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ yajuśākhādhyā
yulaina Āravīṭi rāmarāju śrīraṁgarājayyagāri
putṛlu Aḷiyarāmappayyadēva mahārājulu
gāru . bhāradvājagōtraṁ kātyāyana sūtraṁ
yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina puliveṁdula nārasiṁha
bhaṭlaputṛlu nārayaṇayyagārki dhāravōsi Iccina bhū
dāna dhaṁrmma śāsana kramameṭlaṁnnanu . māku Ama
ranāyaṁkarānaku celli vaccē ghaṁḍikōṭa sīmalōni go
llala vuppalapāṭi grāmānanu tathātidhi dvādaśipuṇyakā
lamaṁdu mīku dhāravōsi Iccina polaṁ go
nālgu puṭlu paṁduṁ kṣētraṁ . yiṁduku yavva
Digital edition of SII 37.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
